name: devhome
description: A developer's home page — daily dev tools and 4K backgrounds on every new tab.

content_security_policy.extension_pages: script-src 'self' 'wasm-unsafe-eval'; object-src 'self'; img-src 'self' data: blob:; media-src 'self' blob:; connect-src 'self' https: data: blob:; worker-src 'self' blob:;
